name: Chicken Pot Pie II
recipeInstructions:
1. Put diced chicken and peas in a casserole dish.
2. In a saucepan, sauté onion in 1 tablespoon margarine.
3. Mix mushroom soup, milk, and marjoram together in a bowl.
4. Add the mixture to the onion in the pan and heat well.
5. Pour over the chicken and peas in the casserole dish.
6. Make biscuits using tea biscuits or Bisquik mix.
7. Place the biscuits on top of the casserole.
8. Bake in a hot oven at 450°F for 20 minutes.
